The Best Way to Store 7-Inch Vinyl Records in 2025 (3D Printed, Holds 50)

April 6, 2025•6 min read

The 7-Inch Storage Problem Nobody Talks About

12-inch vinyl records are easy to store. They stand upright in crates, fit on standard shelves, and the market is full of purpose-built storage solutions. But 7-inch singles? They're awkward. Too small for standard record crates, too numerous to just stack in a box, and too valuable to leave rattling around in a drawer.

Most collectors end up with some improvised system — an old shoebox, a repurposed kitchen container, a bunch of rubber bands — that looks nothing like the rest of their carefully curated setup.

This storage box fixes that.

3D Printed 7-Inch Vinyl Record Storage Box — The Details

This box is made in New York from high-quality PETG and PLA filaments, 3D printed to order. It holds up to 50 seven-inch records in a neat, upright, accessible arrangement — so you can flip through your singles the same way you'd browse a record shop wall.

Color Options

Unlike mass-produced storage products, this box comes in multiple options including a translucent finish that lets you see the record spines from the outside — no digging required. You can also choose from solid color variants to match your shelf aesthetic.

Fully Customizable

The defining feature here is customization. You can have a large custom font logo printed directly onto the box — your DJ name, record label, collection name, or anything else you want. This is what separates a storage box from a storage piece.

Ships from New York

Made to order in New York. Shorter domestic shipping distances mean faster delivery across the US, with no import delays.

Why 3D Printed Is Better for This Use Case

Mass-produced storage boxes are designed for the average record size and the average collector. 3D printed means:

  • Exact internal dimensions for 7-inch records — no wasted space, no tipping
  • Made to order — your box is printed when you order it, not pulled from a warehouse shelf
  • Customizable at the point of manufacture — adding your logo isn't a sticker, it's part of the print
  • PETG durability — PETG is resistant to impact, humidity, and temperature changes, making it more suitable for long-term storage than cheap ABS or cardboard

Who This Is For

  • 7-inch collectors with 20–50 singles who need a proper home for their collection
  • DJs who carry 7-inch records to gigs and need a sturdy, portable storage solution
  • Record labels and DJs who want branded storage for promotional copies or personal sets
  • Gift buyers — this is a standout gift for anyone with a vinyl collection, especially with custom personalization

What to Expect

SpecDetail
CapacityUp to 50 seven-inch records
MaterialPETG + PLA
ColorsTranslucent + 2 solid color options
CustomizationCustom large font logo available
OriginMade in New York
Starting PriceFrom $68

The Bottom Line

If you've been meaning to sort out your 7-inch collection, this is the storage solution that actually respects your records — and looks good on a shelf while doing it. The translucent option in particular is hard to find anywhere else.

Get it on Etsy: [3D Printed 7-Inch Vinyl Record Storage Box](https://www.etsy.com/listing/4468318516/3d-printed-7-inch-vinyl-record-storage)
